title: crotalaria cuneifolia
intro: Crotalaria cuneifolia, also known as wedge-leaf rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria cuneifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
